payload.answer: Possible repair options: keep this as a separate morning-reading preference, or combine it with any existing morning routine note if you want a single consolidated preference.
citations: For context, I usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email.
repair_options: Add as a separate preference: morning technical paper reading before email.
Keep both if there is already a morning routine note and this is an additional detail.
If you want consolidation, choose a merged version that preserves the morning-first reading preference without discarding any prior routine details.
